race.description: The Digger’s Bar Country Boosted Hcp (C1)
race.comment: STERN REMINDER (2) lightly raced gelding with the upside to keep the winning momentum going. Ploughed through the heavy (8) going with a dominant victory over 1200m at Nowra. Has the speed to get across in a fairly average Class 1. GO COMMANDO (3) set to peak third-up after he tired late with a close-up sixth over 1200m at Wagga. Drops in weight with the blinkers going on. Leading prospect. JAMACRI (6) doesn't win out of turn but stays in the mix after savaging the line with a narrow second over 1100m at Wellington. Can race a touch closer today and no shock to see her take this out. THE CONTRACTOR (1) jumped in class with a tough on-pace second over 1200m at Mudgee. Back in his right grade and has genuine winning prospects. TROOPER (5) confidence is high now after he got off the mark at start nine at Canberra. Maps well again.
